title: Silver, Speik and Sumpters
overview: Dramatic reconstruction of life and traditions of the Triebener Tauern region (Austria) in Late Middle Ages from the perspective of a miner and a muleteer. The life in the mine and on the mountain paths of the region is illuminated.
